classification.loc_class: QC - Physics: plasma and electromagnetic fields

theory.canonical_statement: ID3376 records Classical Quantum Gyromagnetic Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `00_Engine\Lemma-Maker\Prism\refactored_derivations.tex` for registry alignment and later derivation.

latex_blocks: \begin{align*} H_{\text{classical}} &= \int_V A\cdot B\,\mathrm{d}^3 r,\\ H_{\text{rotating}} &= -\frac{\omega_{\text{gyro}}}{c^2} \int_V r$\times$(E$\times$ B)\,\mathrm{d}^3 r,\\ H_{\text{quantum}} &= \sum_n n\,\mathrm{Prob}(n_{\text{flux}}=n)\,\frac{\hbar}{2e},\\ H_{\text{photon}} &= \int \hbar \omega_k\,(n_{L,k} - n_{R,k})\,\mathrm{d}^3k. \end{align*}
canonical_equation.source_section_latex: \begin{align*} H_{\text{classical}} &= \int_V A\cdot B\,\mathrm{d}^3 r,\\ H_{\text{rotating}} &= -\frac{\omega_{\text{gyro}}}{c^2} \int_V r$\times$(E$\times$ B)\,\mathrm{d}^3 r,\\ H_{\text{quantum}} &= \sum_n n\,\mathrm{Prob}(n_{\text{flux}}=n)\,\frac{\hbar}{2e},\\ H_{\text{photon}} &= \int \hbar \omega_k\,(n_{L,k} - n_{R,k})\,\mathrm{d}^3k. \end{align*}
